jobs.title: Frontend Engineer (Web) Entity Full-Time Remote  (+/- 3 hours GMT) TypeScript Front-End Web Frameworks Details
jobs.description: TypeScript Front-End Web Frameworks About Entity Entity is on a mission to bring console-quality games to players everywhere - instantly, on any device. Just as software, music and film moved from download and own to click and stream, we believe gaming is shifting from Download and Install to Click and Play Now. Powered by the latest web technologies and built on the open web, Entity is creating a new home for next-gen instant games. For players, a destination to discover and enjoy incredible new titles (think Steam or YouTube for games). For developers, the tools, publishing power, and access to a truly global audience across every connected device. Founded by industry veterans and entrepreneurs, and backed by leading investors, we're assembling our core team. Joining Entity at this stage is a rare opportunity to help shape the future of gaming. About the role We're seeking a Web / Frontend Engineer with a strong design sensibility to help craft the core user experience of our web-based games platform. This role is primarily frontend-focused (~70%), centered on building beautiful, intuitive, and highly polished web interfaces. You'll be shaping how players browse, discover, launch, and engage with games - creating a rich, immersive Games Hub that feels fast, modern, and delightful to use. The remaining ~30% of the role involves collaborating on architecture, performance, and real-time features to ensure those interfaces scale smoothly and feel instant, even under heavy load. We're especially excited about candidates who care deeply about UX/UI details, interaction quality, layout, motion, and visual coherence - and who enjoy working closely with designers to turn strong concepts into pixel-perfect reality. Key Responsibilities Frontend & UX (Primary Focus) Design and build high-quality, visually polished user interfaces for a web-based games platform. Translate design concepts, wireframes, and prototypes into clean, maintainable, production-ready UI code. Focus on

jobs.title: Character Rigger - Anime ARPG Saguni Studio 1500 - 3000$ Freelance Details
jobs.description: To help us process your application efficiently, please start your email subject line with [RIG]. We are looking for a Rigger to join our team on a story-driven anime-inspired action RPG with gacha systems and a strong combat focus, developed in Unreal Engine 5 for PC and mobile with controller support . The game features a third-person camera , a central hub for character and team management, and mission-based levels of around 15 minutes . Our main references are Wuthering Waves , Arknights: Endfield , and Solo Leveling: ARISE , with a visual style that combines a semi-realistic world and stylized characters . In this role, you will build production-ready rigs in Maya for characters , bipedal creatures , and related asset parts such as hair, outfits, accessories, and weapons . Rigs must align with the UE5 skeleton standard , including IK bones , and support clean integration into our existing pipeline. You will be part of the Animation Department , working closely with Character Modeling , and will be expected to deliver both high-quality hero rigs and more efficient secondary rigs while maintaining strong deformation quality across high-poly , low-poly , and LOD-based assets. Responsibilities Create production-ready rigs including skinning and weight painting in Maya for stylized humanoid characters and bipedal creatures, with the ability to adapt to future quadrupedal creature requirements. Build rigs for supporting asset parts such as hair, outfits, accessories, and weapons . Ensure rigs are compatible with the UE5 skeleton template , including proper IK bone setup and a reliable export pipeline into Unreal Engine 5. Collaborate closely with Animators and Character Artists to ensure rigs support both gameplay and cinematic needs. Maintain strong deformation quality across a range of asset types, from hero characters to more production-efficient secondary rigs. Work correctly across different character asset versions, including high-poly cinematic / PC models , l

jobs.title: AI Artist Concept Support - Anime ARPG Saguni Studio 20000 - 30000$ p.a. Full-Time Details
jobs.description: About the Role We are looking for a skilled AI Artist who will work closely with the creative director to produce high-quality visual content across a wide range of formats. You will use the latest AI tools to assist in concept development, world building, character design, level reference, storyboarding, and final art production. Your work will directly shape the visual identity of our projects. Key Responsibilities Storyboard concepts for Cinematics and Gameplay flows World building concepts for entire areas Moodboard creation for entire areas 2D character concepts 2D level concepts 3D character reference and final arts 3D level reference and final arts Poster design (highest quality standard) Branding decks for Webnovel, Webtoon, Game, and Event-related items Marketing materials: Goods and Merchandise Animatics creation: 1st pass videos for Cinematics and Gameplay flows Marketing videos Character Signature Skill Animation videos (Animation, FX) Requirements Strong proficiency with AI image generation and video tools (e.g. Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Kling, Runway, etc.) Familiarity with 2D and 3D modeling workflows and video creation AI software Ability to work closely with the creative director and follow a defined visual concept and vision Fast work speed with consistent output quality Strong understanding of or enthusiasm for fantasy games, webtoons, web novels, movies, and animation content Ability to make swift creative decisions and selections based on provided references Self-motivated and reliable in a fully remote, async workflow Compensation & Details Salary Range: $20,000 – $30,000 USD per year 100% Remote Start date: As soon as possible How to Apply Send your application to: careers@saguni.studio Subject line: [SSAIA] Please include: Portfolio or sample works (links preferred) Brief introduction about your experience with AI tools Any relevant previous projects or work examples About the Role We are looking for a skilled AI Artist who will work clos

jobs.title: Cinematic Animation Artist Saguni Studio Full-Time Details
jobs.description: To help us process your application efficiently, please start your email subject line with [CAA] We are building a stylized anime action RPG in Unreal Engine (PC + Mobile, crossplay). For a 15 minute Gamescom demo (target: August), we are producing a small set of high impact in game cinematics using Level Sequence / Sequencer. We are looking for a Remote Unreal Cinematic Artist (Freelance) who can set up shots in Unreal, build strong camera language, assemble sequences, and create clean gameplay handovers. Our animation workflow is DCC first (Maya or Blender). We do not rely on Unreal Control Rig being set up. You will work closely with our Cinematic Director, Lead Animator, Tech Artist, and VFX and Lighting. Your mission Turn storyboards and shot lists into playable, in engine cinematics that feel premium and are easy to iterate. Create expressive, readable camera work that supports action and emotion. Keep the pipeline clean: consistent shot structure, naming, versioning, and predictable handoffs. Responsibilities Build and maintain Level Sequences and shot structure (shots, sub sequences, takes, versioning). Set up and animate cameras: framing, lens choices, camera movement, shake, focus, and pacing. Assemble imported animation assets into sequencers, handle timing and retiming, and maintain continuity. Collaborate with the Cinematic Director on cut decisions, rhythm, and cinematic language. Work with the Lead Animator to ensure animation readability and camera alignment. Support gameplay integration: triggers, safe handover back to gameplay camera, state restore, and sequencing constraints. Coordinate with VFX and Lighting for shot polish and consistency. Troubleshoot common Sequencer issues: bindings, possessables vs spawnables, animation tracks, transforms, and evaluation. What we are looking for Must haves Proven experience as a Cinematic Artist / Sequencer Artist / Layout Artist in Unreal Engine. Strong camera fundamentals: composition, continuity, action re
